subcodes.first_line: Today the gates of utterance stand wide open, and the Sun of divine knowledge hath risen from the horizon of the heaven of the Lord of Religions, and the oceans of wisdom surge forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ابواب بیان مفتوح و نیر عرفان از افق سماء مالک ادیان مشرق و بحار علوم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
